notes: Plugin self-change; all infra layer; no Playwright/dev-API (no app under test). 'both/frontend' criteria N/A — authorized: this change ships plugin skills/agents/hooks, not an application.

scenarios: a high iteration count does not block

entries.spec_requirement_id: Completion checks are a non-halting worklist
scenarios: incomplete work keeps the loop going
acceptance_criteria: completeness checks still run + enumerate worklist

entries.spec_requirement_id: Oscillation continues with a new angle
scenarios: a recurring SR does not stop the run
acceptance_criteria: recurrence detection retained; action is continue-different-angle, not stop

scenarios: a review loop runs until zero gaps
the discipline is canonical and referenced
acceptance_criteria: no ceiling-as-halt prose in the 4 bodies
scope-isolation artifact + executed FE/API discriminant before deep diagnosis
named metrics recorded to run ledger; frozen-benchmark protocol documented

scenarios: the skill and agent exist and validate
acceptance_criteria: endpoint-trace-mapping skill + endpoint-tracer agent registered + frontmatter-valid

entries.spec_requirement_id: Lineage graph schema, ID nomenclature, and witness verification (P1)
scenarios: witness reconciliation computes recall and hallucination
acceptance_criteria: graph schema+validator; func://asset:// ID rename-stable; witness reconciliation recall+hallucination+threshold; unit-tested

entries.spec_requirement_id: Cost ceiling and transitive freshness for traces (P1)
acceptance_criteria: hard budget + marked truncation; transitive subtree freshness; helpers unit-tested
diagnostic-research-team documents consuming the verified CDLG as call-map input

scenarios: the data-lineage skill exists with a reuse decision
acceptance_criteria: data-lineage-mapping skill present + Reuse Decision vs data-eng
CDLG-based overlap in locks + team-spawning; canonical front->back traversal documented
mempalace-integration documents function-level records keyed by func:// IDs

entries.spec_requirement_id: Worktree polish — squash-merge detection + task-aware heuristic (P6)
scenarios: a squash-merged branch is recognized as merged
acceptance_criteria: squash-merge detection (no false-positive); task-aware worktree heuristic; real-git tests
